# Rajneesh Sharma — Portfolio

> Senior Full Stack & AI Developer. I build production software with AI-native workflows. Open to full-time and contract roles.

## About

Rajneesh Sharma (also known as Rajneesh Kumar Sharma, Rajneesh K Sharma) is a Senior Full Stack JavaScript Developer with 8+ years of experience. Based in North India, he ships high-performance web applications and AI-integrated systems using AI-native delivery workflows. Currently open to full-time, contract, and freelance engagements — remote-first.

Tagline: "Turning complex problems into elegant solutions."

## Value Proposition

Rajneesh ships features 3× faster than traditional workflows by pairing deep engineering craft with AI-native development. A typical auth-system ships in ~3 days (4 steps) instead of ~2 weeks (11 steps), with zero pre-PR bugs.

## Core Skills

- Full Stack Development: React, Next.js, Node.js, TypeScript, Express, Angular
- AI Development: RAG systems, AI automation, MCP workflows, Claude Code, AI-augmented delivery
- AI-Native Workflows: TDD loops, automated security audits, AI-assisted planning and code review
- Cloud & DevOps: AWS (Lambda, EC2, DynamoDB, API Gateway, S3, Cognito, Secret Manager), Docker, CI/CD
- Databases: MongoDB, PostgreSQL, DynamoDB, Redis
- Real-Time & Streaming: Kafka, WebRTC, Socket.io, event-driven systems
- Voice AI: Deepgram, Pipecat, Amazon Lex V2, Amazon Polly
- Architecture: Microservices, REST APIs, GraphQL, serverless, multi-tenant SaaS

## What He Builds

- Full-stack web applications (React + Node.js)
- AI-integrated solutions (RAG chatbots, voice agents, intelligent automation)
- API and backend systems (scalable, production-grade)
- MCP servers and custom AI workflows
- Performance-optimized architecture

## Notable Projects

- **MyWorth.ai** — AI-powered FinTech SaaS for wealth management and asset tracking (LIVE)
- **AI Voice Agent Platform** — White-label outbound AI calling for Indian SMBs, Hindi+English, Pipecat + Deepgram + Amazon Lex V2 (IN DEVELOPMENT)
- **Fluxiontek RAG Chatbot** — Enterprise RAG over 10K+ internal docs with Chainlit + LangChain (LIVE)
- **Kangaroo Propane** — Real-time propane delivery e-commerce with live GPS tracking, iOS + Android (LIVE)
- **Wave Marine** — Multi-vendor marine services marketplace, Kafka-powered real-time updates (LIVE)
- **United Transportation** — Unified logistics TMS with HubSpot + QuickBooks integration (IN DEVELOPMENT)
- **The Canadian Load Board** — B2B logistics platform for Canadian brokers and carriers (DELIVERED)

## AI-Native Delivery

Rajneesh builds WITH AI, not just about AI. His workflow compresses the typical 11-step feature lifecycle (research → PRD → design → scaffold → implement → unit tests → integration tests → manual QA → code review → docs rewrite) into 4 AI-augmented steps:

1. Describe intent to Claude
2. Review + refine plan
3. Implement with TDD loop
4. Security + review audit

Toolbelt: Claude Code, MCP Servers, RAG pipelines, TDD Automation, Security Review, Architecture planning.

## Availability

Open to new opportunities:
- Full-time senior/staff roles (remote-first)
- Long-term and short-term contracts
- Freelance engagements
